The French government reported that during the heat wave that affected the country in June, more than 2 thousand more deaths were recorded in a week compared to the average of previous years. In Paris, on June 26, 109 people lost their lives due to the heat in just one day.

Lutetiae Parisiorum, die XXVI mensis Iunii, anno 109, uno tantum die ob aestum vitam amiserunt.

In June, turnover in the cooler product category increased by 55 percent and the number of orders increased by 40 percent.
